subtasks.description: Query sam_licenses collection to retrieve current Adobe contract state: product line, licensee count, contract term end date, and agreed value. Filter for active Adobe contracts.

Generate SQL query against consumption_facts to retrieve Q4 2024 actual spend by Adobe product line and 90-day usage trend (current vs. prior 90 days). Join or correlate with product taxonomy if needed.

Reconcile contracted state (from sam_licenses) with Q4 actual spend and 90-day usage trends (from consumption_facts). Classify each product line by posture (expand, hold, reduce) based on utilization gap, trend direction, and contract-to-spend variance. Generate renewal trajectory and expansion/reduction recommendations by product line.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks: mongo_query to retrieve current contract state (small tier — straightforward collection scan with Adobe filter), sql_gen to fetch spend and usage metrics from consumption_facts with trend calculation (mid tier — requires multi-period aggregation and trend logic), and cross_recon at frontier tier to reconcile two sources, compute utilization gaps, detect spend-contract variance, classify posture, and generate trajectory recommendations with multi-signal reasoning. The frontier tier is justified because posture classification requires synthesizing contracted capacity, actual spend, usage trends, and directional signals to make renewal strategy calls. Dependencies: cross_recon depends on both upstream sources completing. This is the minimum decomposition — the classification and recommendation logic are integrated into cross_recon rather than split into separate policy or planning steps.

output.sql: SELECT cf.product, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-31' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2024_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-31' THEN cf.daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2024_total_seats, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-31' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-31' THEN cf.daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END), 0) AS q4_spend_per_seat, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-09-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-10-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS prior_90_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-09-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-10-01' THEN cf.daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) AS prior_90_seats, (SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-31' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-09-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-10-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-09-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-10-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END), 0) AS spend_trend_pct, (SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-31' THEN cf.daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-09-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-10-01' THEN cf.daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-09-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-10-01' THEN cf.daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END), 0) AS seat_trend_pct FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher = 'Adobe' AND (cf.event_date >= '2024-09-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-31') GROUP BY cf.product ORDER BY q4_2024_spend DESC
